CustomField.description: SOQL Rows usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsSoqlRowsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c / LimitsSoqlRowsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoqlRows.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c / LimitsSoqlRowsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoqlRows.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c / LimitsSoqlRowsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsSoqlRowsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: SOQL Rows usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: SOQL Rows
